overview: Vetify is an AI-powered halal/ethical finance vetting and profiling platform connecting financing seekers with ethical financial institutions.
features: Multi-step registration forms for Individual, Business, and Financier applicants
AI agents Tawthiq, Mizan, and Kashif for compliance, risk scoring, and matching
Direct messaging between financiers and applicants
Public applicant profiles with privacy controls
Standalone Terms and Privacy Policy pages
Role-based dashboards with notification centre and messaging inbox
